item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant correctly recognized the user already wanted to stop page-level patching and redesign the upstream after-sales rules entry. It stayed direct, proposed a unified rules center, summaries plus links, a decision module, unified maintenance, and rollout order. No triage/method false fire or over-methodized stop appeared."}
